name: afters-tools
description: Afters Tools — safe, reversible Mac automation. Keep your Mac fast and your files tidy, with nothing destructive and everything undoable.

plugins.name: workstation-autopilot
plugins.description: Reports resource hogs and safely auto-cleans an allowlist (system tuning); auto-sorts Downloads & Desktop by file type with full undo (file organization). Safe-by-default and reversible.
